locations.name: 乌干达

relations.subject: Mountain buzzard
relations.evidence: The mountain buzzard occurs in the mountainous regions of eastern Africa from Ethiopia, west through Kenya, Uganda, South Sudan and Rwanda to eastern Democratic Republic of Congo then south into Tanzania, Burundi and Malawi

relations.subject: Mountain buzzard
relations.evidence: The mountain buzzard (Buteo oreophilus) is a bird of prey that lives in montane forests in East Africa, it and the forest buzzard (Buteo trizonatus) of southern Africa were, until recently, considered to be a single species
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Mountain buzzard
relations.evidence: This species occurs in montane forest and fragments of montane forest, including plantations of exotic trees such as eucalyptus
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。
